summary: Iteration 100 - Competitor Intelligence Hub fully tested. All backend APIs working (13/13 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: 6 seeded competitors displayed, Add/Delete/Scrape functionality working, Intel detail panel with tabs (Overview/Pricing/Courses/Raw Content) functional. Executive Dashboard Team Mood Pulse section confirmed. Claret Widget opens with daily briefing content. CS Student Modal tabs verified in iteration 99.

minor.issue: DNS resolution fails for external domains from container (e.g., 'Name or service not known'). This is expected container limitation, not a code bug.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 seeded competitors: Delta Trading Academy, FundFloat, Mithuns Money Market, Stellar FX, James Trading Institute, Moneytize
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 verified Competitor Intelligence Hub: 1) GET /api/intelligence/competitors returns 6 seeded competitors. 2) POST /api/intelligence/competitors adds new competitor (duplicate check works). 3) POST /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/scrape triggers web scraping (DNS may fail for external domains from container). 4) GET /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/intel returns scraped data. 5) DELETE /api/intelligence/competitors/{id} removes competitor. 6) GET /api/intelligence/daily-briefing returns personalized briefing sections. 7) Frontend CompetitorIntelligencePage at /competitor-intelligence shows all competitors with Add/Scrape/Delete buttons. 8) Intel detail panel opens on card click with Overview/Pricing/Courses/Raw Content tabs. 9) Claret Widget shows daily briefing on open. 10) Executive Dashboard Team Mood Pulse section has data-testid='team-mood-section'. 11) Competitor Intel link visible in sidebar under Security section.

competitor_intelligence_page.details: Page loads at /competitor-intelligence with 6 seeded competitors displayed as cards. Each card shows name, website, social icons, last scraped date, and active status badge.

add_competitor_dialog.details: Add Competitor button opens dialog with fields: Name, Website, Social Links (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter, Google Reviews), Notes. Save creates new competitor.

scrape_competitor.details: Scrape button triggers POST /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/scrape. Returns success message with scrape results. DNS may fail for external domains from container.

view_competitor_intel.details: Clicking competitor card opens Intel detail panel with tabs: Overview, Pricing, Courses, Raw Content. Shows scraped data with source type, timestamp, and content.

delete_competitor.details: Delete button with confirmation removes competitor. Toast shows 'Competitor removed' message.

daily_briefing_endpoint.details: GET /api/intelligence/daily-briefing returns personalized sections: Sales Pipeline, Today's Action Items, Student Overview, Today's Motivation, Competitive Edge.

claret_widget_daily_briefing.details: Claret widget (purple button bottom-left) opens with AI chat interface showing mood indicator and business insights.

executive_dashboard_team_mood.details: Team Mood Pulse section visible at bottom of Executive Dashboard with data-testid='team-mood-section'. Shows team cards with mood scores.

sidebar_competitor_intel_link.details: Competitor Intel link visible in sidebar under Security section for CEO/Admin roles.

backend_api_add_competitor.details: POST /api/intelligence/competitors creates new competitor. Returns 409 for duplicates, 400 for missing name.

backend_api_scrape.details: POST /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/scrape triggers scraping. Returns 404 for non-existent competitor.

backend_api_delete.details: DELETE /api/intelligence/competitors/{id} removes competitor. Returns 404 for non-existent.

access_control.details: Unauthenticated requests return 403. CS Head can access competitor intelligence endpoints.
